description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, lying flat on his back with arms resting at his sides. He is dressed in a casual, long-sleeved plaid shirt and a pair of fitted jeans, both of which appear slightly wrinkled, suggesting a relaxed, everyday look. His feet are bare, and his toes are visible, indicating he is not wearing any footwear. The figure's hair is short and neatly styled, and his facial features are well-defined, with a neutral expression. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly curled. The overall appearance is that of a typical urban pedestrian in casual attire, suitable for a variety of city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult male lying on his back, wearing a plaid shirt and jeans with bare feet and short hair.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the plaid shirt, short hair, and both arms resting at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the body, and the relaxed arm and hand.
description_view_2: View from the feet, showing bare soles, jeans, and the front of the shirt and face.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the side of the face, body, and the relaxed posture of the arms and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeved shirt and fitted jeans
